patch.value: Declare pm_min_version in all 8 first-party package manifests

Loader enforces pm_min_version for external packages but all 8 first-party manifests omit it: future breaking SDK changes load stale packages silently, and external authors have no model example. Completes the pm-oxyo version-negotiation story.
Each packages/pm-*/extensions/*/manifest.json declares pm_min_version; scaffold emits a commented placeholder; governance check (see manifest governance test) verifies presence.

Loader enforces pm_min_version for external packages but all 8 first-party manifests omit it: future breaking SDK changes load stale packages silently, and external authors have no model example. Completes the pm-oxyo version-negotiation story.

value.author: sdk-version-compat-agent
value.text: Declared manifest_version:1 + pm_min_version:2026.5.0 on all 8 first-party manifests (beads/calendar/governance-audit/guide-shell/linked-test-adapters/search-advanced/templates/todos). Chose floor 2026.5.0 (not 2026.5.31): every current 2026.5.x CLI satisfies it, so it does not gate any live install, while still modeling the field for external authors. All 8 verified valid strict JSON with trailing newlines preserved. Scaffold (src/cli/commands/extension/scaffold.ts) now emits manifest_version:1 + pm_min_version:2026.5.0 and documents pm_min_version/pm_max_version semantics in both generated READMEs (package + extension), since manifest.json cannot hold comments. Governance enforcement landed under pm-exrw.

patch.value: Declared manifest_version:1 and pm_min_version:2026.5.0 across all 8 packages/pm-*/extensions/*/manifest.json (floor chosen so no live 2026.5.x install is gated while modeling the field for external authors); scaffold.ts emits them; docs/EXTENSIONS.md documents the fields.

All 8 first-party extension manifests now declare manifest_version:1 + pm_min_version:2026.5.0; scaffold emits both fields and documents pm_min/pm_max semantics in generated READMEs; governance enforced via pm-exrw. Verified by build + targeted vitest (90 passing) + temp-dir manual test (scaffolded manifest carries the fields).
